name: Japanese Pickled Cauliflower
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the cauliflower into florets and wash thoroughly.
2. Wash, core, seed, and cut the green bell pepper into 2-inch strips.
3. Place the vegetables in a large jar or container.
4. Pour boiling water over the vegetables until completely submerged.
5. Add celery (1/2 cup), Coca-Cola (3/4 cup), wine vinegar (6 tbsp), sugar (1/4 cup), and salt (1 1/2 tsp) to the jar.
6. Seal the container tightly and let it cool to room temperature.
7. Store in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
